meta-description: Learn about the health care workforce incentive by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Health care workforce incentive
excerpt: The use of incentives and recruiting to encourage people to enter into health care professions like primary care and to encourage providers to practice in underserved areas.
content: The use of incentives and recruiting to encourage people to enter into health care professions like primary care and to encourage providers to practice in underserved areas.
